rationale: Entity-name blank at the top of the body. Domestic-Maine filing → entity.name.

label_verbatim: [ ] A meeting was duly called and held at which a majority of shareholders voted to resume transacting business.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=346.5); enum_select value 'meeting'.

label_verbatim: [ ] The vote to resume transacting business was duly authorized by written consent of the shareholders.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=430.4); enum_select value 'written_consent'.

label_verbatim: FIRST (meeting branch): This meeting was held on (date)
rationale: Date of the shareholder meeting (required when resumption.method='meeting').
Location of the shareholder meeting (required when resumption.method='meeting').

label_verbatim: THIRD: The effective date of the certificate of resumption (if other than the date of filing of the certificate of resumption):
rationale: Optional THIRD-paragraph effective date (left blank when resumption is effective on the filing date). Determined by widget y-coordinate: 14a6 sits at y≈231 between the FIRST/SECOND body and the bottom signature row at y≈190 (14a7).  Filler engine: leave blank when caller wants effective-on-filing-date semantics.
Date of signature on the page-0 signature row (left side, y≈190, narrow x≈74–194). The paired '*By' signature line at the same y on the right side is wet-ink-only and not AcroForm-bound.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the signing officer. Shape D — same convention as MBCA-11 / MLLC-12. The footnote restricts the signer to 'any duly authorized officer of the corporation' per 13-C MRSA §121.5.
